feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Landed Costs with Fixed Assets shows error
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.270) SP 2411. While creating Landed Costs document with fixed assets, I have faced with this error: "[Landed Costs - Rows - Duty Rate][line: 10] , 'No matching records found 'GL Accounts' (OACT) (ODBC -2028)' [Message 131-183]". I attached screencast of issue. What is the duty rate in the rows? There is no this column. 

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Error While Trying to take Control of Query Manager Matrix in Addon using C# in SAP B1
entry.content:
I need to find and open my addon screen by double clicking the docEntry column in query manager. But I could not take the control of the matrix using SAPbouiCOM.Matrix OMatrix=frmQuerymanage.Items.Item("7").Specific I got an error as
"Click Event Failed: Unable to cast COM object of type 'System._ComObject' to interface type 'SAPbouiCOM.Matrix'. This operation failed because the Query Interface call on the COM component for the interface with IID '[85689291-F296-4A2E-8EB8-FF9189E23425}' " Same happens when I tried for Grid.
Kindly Suggest a Solution

entry.title: In SAP Business One, what is the purpose of the Order Number field in the Accounting tab of purchase
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In SAP B1, on purchase forms like Purchase Quotation and Purchase Order, there is a field called Order Number in the Accounting tab.

I would like to know:

  1. How is this field populated?
  2. Does it have any impact elsewhere in the system?
  3. Is it possible to generate reports using this field?

entry.title: Error ID: 1470000192 - No es posible la cancelación de Nota de Credito
entry.content:
Error ID: 1470000192 - No es posible la cancelación. El abono abona total o parcialmente los anticipos que se arrastraron a la factura.

El error corresponde cuando quiero cancelar una nota de crédito vinculada a una factura que contiene anticipos aplicados.

Cancele el pago de la factura anticipo y el error persiste

Busque el ID interno de reconciliación de partidas pero no me permite cancelar puesto que la reconciliación se da con la creación de la nota de crédito

 

De que manera podría solucionar esto en SAP SQL vs. 10 FP2105

entry.title: Authorizations
entry.content: What authorization is needed for an user in SAP business to be able to check\uncheck the box of permit change of control accounts in the G\L account determination

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 SQL - DTW Authentication Problem
entry.content:
SAP Business One SQL 

Hello everyone,

We recently set up a new SAP B1 v10.0 SQL environment, and we are experiencing the following problem when trying to use the DTW tool:

I have tried several possibilities, but the problem with authentication persists. Can anyone who has experienced this problem tell me how to solve it?

entry.title: Somehow couldnt connect to SLD. but to some logged in users they could actually use the app
entry.content:
a user that just came in to work suddenly unable to log in

on logged in user however, are able to use the app as usual

 

but unable to relog due to database went missing.

 

logged in users can post or update, however other users are unable to log in.

entry.title: Query OQUT ORDR
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I'm looking for a query that returns the offers that have been closed but have no order. i.e. they have been closed manually.

The query I'm using is not working and is returning all closed offers, no matter if there is an order or not. I just want those that have no offer. 

Can anyone help me? Thank you!

entry.title: Ho to validate using the API if a user has authorization to acess a document ?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to validate using the API if a user has authorisation to acess a document? Or do some task ?

I understand we can't access the authorisations table OPRM, but how can we validate?

Thanks
Paulo Ferreira

entry.title: Not able to upload values of UDF via DTW SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Recently I am uploading transactional data ( Goods Receipt) from DTW and there are some UDFs in document level for which I need to upload values , how to add those UDFs in the excel templates, please guide.

entry.title: Count User Daily Activity
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I am working on tracking daily user operations.

How many...

A/P Invoice

A/P Credit Memo

A/R Invoice

A/R Credit Memo

Incoming payment

Journal Entry

Internal Reconciliation

...the operator has done?

Which SAP BO tables are of interest? I will work directly on the Database

Thank you all for your help

entry.title: Unable to understand the few columns in IGN1 sheet while uploading GR document through DTW
entry.content:
Hello Community ,

I am going to upload few transaction of Goods Receipt document and currently using the sheet for the table IGN1, here it showing in the first column showing "parent key" and the second is showing the "line number". 

Please let me know the meaning of this 2 columns

entry.title: Error while performing Inventory trasnfer ( warehouse transfer ) in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Everyone ,


Need guidance in this , while performing stock transfer ( warehouse transfer ) from SAP B1 , HANA environment , system is generating this error " 1). [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] Syntax error or access violation;257 sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near ",": line 1 col 8 '' (NFN1) (at pos 8)" after selecting the update button.

Need help to troubleshoot

entry.title: Error while uploading data through DTW for Good Receipt transaction
entry.content:
In OIGN table I have maintained both DocDate and TaxDate and date format is as per given in General Settings screen, even though system is generating this error and thus unable to run the simulation.


"CServiceData::SetPropertyValueDateString failed; Invalid date format in property 'DocDate' of 'Document'65171 "


Any idea about this ?

entry.title: Is it necessary to separate B1i application and database?
entry.content:
Hey guys familiar with B1i,

I am using B1 10.0 and B1i  1.0.  Recently I’ve encountered issues with B1i performance. The message log keeps reporting "XCE208 Resource is busy" error while handling the event message. It's not always but sometimes. I login the B1i server and it seems the integration service and SQL Server take up most of the memory, reaches to 90%.

I used to be a dotnet developer. In my book, it's always a good design to deploy the application and database to standalone server since they are both memory intense services.

So my question is  should I separate B1i application and database to different server? Is it risky or will be benefit for the B1i performance? It will be great if we have the answer from the B1 official answer.

Thanks!

#SAP B1  #SAP B1i

entry.title: Individual alert in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to assign an alert to several users, but the alert should only be received by the user associated with the document.

I use user query:

SELECT 'In' + CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),CAST(T1.[CLOSE] AS DATE)) AS nvarchar(MAX)) +' days the task '+ UPPER(CAST(T1.DSCRIPTION AS nvarchar(MAX))) + ' deadline is approaching in project' + UPPER(CAST(T0.Name AS NVARCHAR(MAX)))
FROM
OPMG T0 join PMG1 T1 on T1.AbsEntry = T0.AbsEntry
WHERE CAST(T1.[CLOSE] AS DATE) <= CAST(DATEADD(DAY, 6, GETDATE()) AS DATE) AND CAST(T1.[CLOSE] AS DATE) > CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
AND T1.FINISH <> 'Y'
AND T1.U_alert = 'Y'
AND (select UserId FROM OHEM WHERE empID = T1.[OWNER]) = $[USER]

The problem is the syntax $[USER] is not working in alerts.

Do you know how to solve this problem?

entry.title: SAP Business One 10 SP 4211, SLD installation/upgrade error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

SAP Business One 

We are upgrading our system to B11000SP_2411. We are preparing a new system with Windows Server 2022 and SQL Server 2022/2019 Express. But we are getting SLD error when installing the server tools. We are using 3rd party pfx ssl file that is working in the older sap versions.

In the "B1WinInstaller_202501051428.log" log file we have this error 

--------------------------------------

[14:37:06][ FINEST] [OUTPUT2] SldInstallerTool execution failed
[14:37:06][ FINEST] [OUTPUT2] @{exitcode=0; stdout=false&RegisterAdminClient error: {"error" : {"code" : "16000", "message" : {"lang" : "en-US", "value" : "System Error: PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target executing POST https://quaint.arynitsap.com:40020/auth/realms/master/protocol/openid-connect/token"}}}; stderr=}
[14:37:06][ FINEST] [OUTPUT2] At C:\Users\vinay\AppData\Local\Temp\B1-KZVFvffWXpipghUolVFR\Installation Directory\SAP Business One SetupFiles\support\bin\WizardUtils_tools.ps1:263 char:9
[14:37:06][ FINEST] [OUTPUT2] + throw "SldInstallerTool execution failed`n$result"

------------------------------------------------------

Attachments -

  1. SLD Error.png - Error screenshot

Can you please help with it urgently?

Thanks

Vinay

entry.title: Blocking "minimum stock" field from Item Master Data for a user
entry.content:
Hello experts,

there's a user that keeps editing without noticing the minimum stock required of an item. Is there a way to block this field (marked in yellow in my screenshot)?

The user needs to have access to other data in the item master data sheet, its just this field that should be blocked. 

What options do we have?

Thank you!!

entry.title: Sevice Layer WTLiable for BPWithholdingTaxCollection
entry.content:
Hello Guys,
I'm working with SL to create/update BP Master data but if I try to populate the BPWithholdingTaxCollection (table CRD4 for supplier only) the PTACH returns no errors but my target CRD4 is empty.

I've identified the reason: I can correctly populate BPWithholdingTaxCollection only if previously and manually I'll activate the check "WTLiable" in the master data, section Accounting\Tax before PATCH it.


I don't find a SL fields exposed for WTLiable tYES/tNO in the main BusinessPartner (OCRD.WTLiable).

Someone should tell me if it exists and which is the extension.name ?

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Account Code and Name Query with Parent and Child in same Row
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I found an awesome query which I managed to modify to suit, but need it modified a bit more and I havent been able to resolve it, a bit out of my capacity and i am not sure if it can be achieved

So, what I need is the results to show the Parent part number and names to be repeated so that the parent code and name and in the same rows as the child code and names
I have attached two txt files one with the Actual results I get when I run the query, and one txt file which what is my expectation of the results when I run the query (for privacy reasons I have cleared the data from names columns)
Below is the query (i tried to upload the files in Excel format, but unable to do so, hence had to save as txt)

 

SELECT 
    TBL1.[GROUP],
    TBL1.[Main Account] AS [Main Account],
    TBL1.[Main Account Name] AS [Main Account Name],
    TBL1.[Sub Account] AS [Sub Account],
    TBL1.[Sub Account Name] AS [Sub Account Name],
    TBL1.[Detailed Account] AS [Detailed Account],
    TBL1.[Detailed Account Name] AS [Detailed Account Name],
    TBL1.[Segmented Account] AS [Segmented Account],
    TBL1.[Segmented Account Name] AS [Segmented Account Name],
    TBL1.[Sub-Segmented Account] AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
    TBL1.[Sub-Segmented Account Name] AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name]
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask, 
        t0.grpline, 
        t0.levels, 
        T0.[AcctCode] AS [Main Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Main Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub Account], 
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        T0.[Segment_0] + '-' + T0.[Segment_1] + '-' + T0.[Segment_2] AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '1'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        T0.[AcctCode] AS [Sub Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '2'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        '-' AS [Sub Account],
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        T0.[AcctCode] AS [Detailed Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Detailed Account Name],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '3'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        '-' AS [Sub Account],
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        T0.[Segment_0] + '-' + T0.[Segment_1] + '-' + T0.[Segment_2] AS [Segmented Account],
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '4'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        '-' AS [Sub Account],
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        T0.[Segment_0] + '-' + T0.[Segment_1] + '-' + T0.[Segment_2] AS [Sub-Segmented Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '5'
) TBL1
ORDER BY
    TBL1.groupmask,
    TBL1.grpline,
    TBL1.levels

 





Regards
Rah
